values: Being slow causes you to struggle to be a part of the team
Not being fit causes you to miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs

evidence.quote_or_summary: You struggle to be a part of the team because you're slow. You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs for you.

values: Walk, jog or run 5 km in under 32 minutes

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Nafran Valley Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 32 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.

values: Fitness approval from the Indiahikes team is required 20 days before the trek date
Without fitness approval, trekkers will not be allowed on the trek
Only running, jogging or walking are accepted as fitness proofs; cross-training workouts will not be considered valid
At least 3 runs from the last 1 month must meet the fitness criteria
Use apps like Nike and Strava to record runs
Paste the public profile link on the Indiahikes account
Fitness level must be met at least three times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
So make sure to record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month to meet the fitness criteria of the trek.

Use apps like Nike and Strava to record your runs. Paste your profile's link on your Indiahikes account (your profile has to be public). Ensure that at least 3 runs from the last 1 month meet the fitness criteria of your specific trek.
Instances we may reject your fitness record: If you fail to link your fitness profile. If you do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month.

values: 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins
6-week fitness plan available for running and walking

evidence.quote_or_summary: All you need to do is start following the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before your trek begins.
If you are not currently active, follow the below schedule to get trek fit in 6 weeks! A 6-Week Plan to Help You Get Trek-Fit for the Nafran Valley Trek.
Strength Training Schedule: Nafran Valley Trek Strength Training.

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records
Parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.

values: You do not enjoy the trek
You struggle to be a part of the team because you are slow
You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs

evidence.quote_or_summary: What happens if you are not fit: You do not enjoy the trek. You struggle to be a part of the team because you're slow. You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs for you.
